benchmarks.notes: Small Python CLI benchmark with low setup cost

benchmarks.notes: Small .NET in-memory CRUD benchmark with multi-story structure

benchmarks.notes: Server/process lifecycle benchmark with lightweight API behavior

benchmarks.notes: Very small JSON/file benchmark with focused test pressure and low setup cost

benchmarks.name: Hourly Python Tiny Library
benchmarks.notes: Cheap Python library benchmark without CLI or server scaffolding

benchmarks.name: Hourly Frontend Build Only

suites.name: Smoke Suite
suites.notes: Fastest benchmark layer for loop-overhead and cheap verification signal in just a few minutes.

suites.name: Quick Feedback Suite
suites.notes: Regular benchmark layer for day-to-day loop changes, kept around a half-hour budget.

suites.name: Hourly Coverage Suite
suites.notes: Broader suite for cheap libraries, cheap CLIs, and non-browser frontend work while keeping the Windows-friendly hourly layer comfortably under 60 minutes.

suites.name: Deep Coverage Suite
suites.notes: Broadest suite covering cheap paths first, then API, .NET, and browser-heavier frontend work.
